response.step_by_step_log:
1. Visual OCR: Detected 'Paradise Lost' at 00:00 and 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' at 01:01 in the video overlays.
2. Metadata Resolution:
   - 'Paradise Lost' -> Original Artist: Minori Chihara (from Ga-Rei: Zero).
   - 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' -> Original Artist: Uma Musume (Cygames).
3. Web Search Strategy:
   - '"Paradise Lost" Minori Chihara Japanese and English lyrics'
   - '"GIRLS' LEGEND U" Uma Musume Japanese and English lyrics'
4. JSON construction: Scenes mapped chronologically, song metadata and lyrics populated accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features a two-song musical performance by members of Hololive, a virtual YouTuber agency. It starts with a cover of 'Paradise Lost' (originally by Minori Chihara from 'Ga-Rei: Zero') and transitions into 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' (originally from 'Uma Musume Pretty Derby').

scenes.description: Performance starts with 'Paradise Lost'. Text 'Paradise Lost' appears in the top-left corner. The performers are dancing and singing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Seinaru hitomi ga itami wo utsushitara
Furimuite goran?
Jounetsu hanatsu Trick
Kuzureru ashimoto futari wa modorenai
Sashinobeta te wo hodokanaide
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If holy eyes reflect pain
Won't you look back?
Passion releasing a Trick
Our feet crumbling, we can't go back
Don't let go of the reached-out hand

scenes.description: Transition to 'GIRLS' LEGEND U'. Text 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' appears on screen. The performance continues with complex choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Wow wow wow wow...
Yatto minna aeta ne
Don't stop! No, don't stop 'til finish!
Zutto zutto zutto zutto omoi
Yume wa kitto kanau kara
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Whoa whoa whoa whoa...
It's time for us to meet at last
Don't stop! No, don't stop till the finish!
Keep on dreaming, it's sure to come true
